turn_log.delta: Replace the three-column features grid with a single-column list of research abstracts separated by hairline dividers — each entry is a title line in Source Serif 4 at 20px followed by body text, no icons, no cards, no grid — matching the Research Abstract Block described in the Components section of the prose.
turn_log.rationale: The features section uses a three-column card grid — a conventional SaaS-style layout that contradicts the persona's principle of emptiness and the prose's assertion that 'a symbol that almost-disappears succeeds better than one that asserts'; icon-topped feature cards are precisely the decorative iconography the persona refuses.
